caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, specifically focusing on the instrument cluster. The display indicates that the vehicle is not yet started, as it prompts the driver to "Press Brake and Push Button to Start." The odometer reading is visible, showing 20434 miles. The speedometer and tachometer gauges are also in view, with the needle on the tachometer resting at zero, indicating that the engine is off. The brake warning light is illuminated, signaling that the parking brake is engaged or there is an issue with the brake system. The camera remains steady, capturing the details of the dashboard without any movement or change in perspective.
